chosen_action.title: Distribution architecture churn-guard repair: stabilize empty-board post-release handling

why_this_action.summary: The execution board remained empty after the short review window cleared, and the runner/selector path still needed a same-slot duplicate-repair guard plus accurate Reddit runtime status resolution.
supporting_reasons: Prevent immediate same-fingerprint post-release repair loops from re-firing in the next active-loop slot.
Resolve custom-path Reddit execution status lookups so runtime readiness and blockage signals come from the intended artifact during tests and isolated runs.
Keep Codeberg-primary distribution logic grounded in verified guard behavior instead of stale measurement-hold churn.

result.summary: Patched the runner to persist a short post-release guard pause after same-fingerprint distribution-architecture repairs, fixed Reddit execution-status path resolution for isolated runs, and verified with 101 focused marketing tests.

verification.guard_reason: empty-board post-release duplicate repair suppression installed and verified
